startPoint.en: Talk to Juna, inside the cave under Lumbridge Swamp. (via → )
startPoint.es: Habla con Juna, dentro de la cueva bajo Lumbridge Swamp. (vía →)

children.name: Lorehound
children.display: This can be obtained from the Lorehound with the 50 quest point upgrade

items.name: Lumbridge Swamp Caves
items.display: A rope, if it is your first time accessing Lumbridge Swamp Caves, and you are not accessing it through the Lumbridge Castle entrance.

children.name: Lorehound
children.display: This can be obtained from the Lorehound with the 50 quest point upgrade

recommended.name: Thieving
recommended.display: 36 Thieving and Death to the Dorgeshuun for alternative lantern source

recommended.name: Crafting
recommended.display: 49 Crafting, if you wish to make your own lantern. You don't need these levels to replace the lens by a sapphire in an existing bullseye lantern.

recommended.name: The Lost Tribe
recommended.display: Unlocking the swamp shortcut during The Lost Tribe for ease of getting to Juna.

recommended.name: The Lost Tribe
recommended.display: Starting The Lost Tribe to access the Lumbridge Swamp Caves through the Lumbridge's kitchen tunnel and having a lit sapphire lantern can be used to avoid the other items required.

children.name: Spiny helmet
children.display: Spiny helmet/Slayer helmet to negate damage from wall beasts.

rewards.name: Tears of Guthix
rewards.display: Ability to play Tears of Guthix once a week
Ability to make an ornate bowl for increased experience with 80 and

rewards.name: Tears of Guthix
rewards.display: Tears of Guthix teleport option on the games necklace

text.en: Use a cut sapphire on an oil filled bullseye lantern.
text.es: Usa un zafiro tallado en una linterna de diana rellena de aceite.

text.en: Travel to the dark hole under tree slightly north west of the water altar in Lumbridge Swamp.
text.es: Viaja hasta el agujero oscuro bajo el árbol un poco al noroeste del altar de agua en Lumbridge Swamp.

text.en: Climb down the hole to access Lumbridge Swamp Caves.
text.es: Baja por el agujero para acceder a las Lumbridge Swamp Caves.

text.en: If this is your first visit, Use the rope on the tree.
text.es: Si es tu primera visita, usa la cuerda en el árbol.

text.en: Recommended: Equip a spiny helmet/slayer helmet to negate damage from wall beasts, or use a movement ability like Surge or Dive to prevent the wall beasts from attacking.
text.es: Recomendado: Equípate un spiny helmet/slayer helmet para anular el daño de los wall beasts, o usa una habilidad de movimiento como Surge o Dive para evitar que los wall beasts te ataquen.

text.en: Run to the south east end of the cavern.
text.es: Corre hasta el extremo sureste de la caverna.

text.en: Jump-across the stepping stone to the south (see shortcut icon on the map shown)
text.es: Salta sobre la piedra de paso hacia el sur (mira el icono de atajo en el mapa mostrado)

text.en: Dismiss all followers and un-equip items held in hand.
text.es: Despide a todos tus seguidores y quítate los objetos equipados en la mano.

text.en: On the north side of the cavern near the entrance, Right-click travel across cavern on a light creature.
text.es: En el lado norte de la caverna, cerca de la entrada, haz clic derecho para viajar a través de la caverna sobre una criatura de luz.

text.en: Jump the cliff to the east.
text.es: Salta el acantilado hacia el este.

text.en: Run north and talk to Juna
text.es: Corre hacia el norte y habla con Juna

text.en: If you've already completed The Chosen Commander.
text.es: Si ya has completado The Chosen Commander.

chatOptions: 4 So I'm an enemy of the gods now?
2 I'd like to talk about something else.

text.en: Craft the magic stone into a stone bowl.
text.es: Fabrica el cuenco de piedra a partir de la piedra mágica.
